Kyle Sagnella is one of the coolest guys you'll ever meet. He's always the life of the party, with his infectious energy and positive attitude. Not to mention, he's got impeccable taste when it comes to cars. Just take a look at his latest ride, a sleek vehicle decked out in Alpine White with black 19 wheels. But the cherry on top is definitely the Executive Package, valued at $4,000.

This package includes luxurious features like Soft-Close Automatic Doors, Power Rear Sunshade and Rear Side Window Shades, Front Ventilated Seats, Front and Rear Heated Seats, 4-Zone Automatic Climate Control, Front Massaging Seats, Parking Assistant Plus, Wireless Charging, Active Park Distance Control, Rear View Camera, and Surround View with 3D View. With all of these added touches, Kyle's ride is not only stylish on the outside, but incredibly comfortable and convenient on the inside.

And let's not forget about the M Carbon Ceramic Brakes, ensuring top-notch performance and stopping power. Paired with the Full Merino Leather Upholstery, this car is the epitome of luxury and sophistication. Kyle Sagnella truly knows how to roll in style.

    Equipment Group 301A ($1,670 value)

      Trailer Tow Package ($495 value)

      • Class IV Trailer Hitch Receiver

      Safety and Security

      • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
      • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
      • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.
      • Brake assist - Stop right there. Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now! With brake assist, you will. It uses the speed of the brake pedal’s travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.

      Technology and Telematics

      • Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system. Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road.

Introducing the 2019 Subaru Forester Limited, a true marvel on wheels with only 39495 miles! This sport utility vehicle boasts a powerful 4 Cylinder Engine, accompanied by a smooth CVT transmission, ensuring exhilarating drives and effortless handling. With its striking Ice Silver Metallic exterior and sleek Black interior, this Forester is ready to turn heads wherever you go. OTHER NOTABLE FEATURES AND OPTIONS YOU SHOULD KNOW ABOUT:

Navigation System and Harman Kardon and Reverse Automatic Braking ($1,695 value)

  • Heated Steering Wheel
  • Subaru Starlink 8.0 Multimedia Navigation System Radio
  • Reverse Automatic Braking System (RAB)

Comfort

  • Heated steering wheel - A warm touch. Trying to drive with bulky winter gloves on isn't always easy. Keep your hands warm in cold temperatures so you can ditch the mitts and get a firm grip with this heated steering wheel.

Safety and Security

  • The vehicle constantly monitors the roadway in front of the vehicle and identifies and tracks pedestrians on an interior display. If the system determines a likely impact, it will automatically take preventative steps to avoid hitting the pedestrian.
  • The vehicle is equipped with a system that senses, and then prepares, the vehicle and/or occupants, for an impending forward collision.
  • The vehicle is equipped with a camera that displays an image of the area behind the vehicle on an interior display. The camera is equipped with its own washer.
  • The vehicle is equipped with a system that senses, and then prepares, the vehicle and/or occupants, for an impending rear collision.
  • An active lane departure system alerts the driver of unintended movement of the vehicle out of a designated traffic lane and automatically maintains the vehicle's position within that lane.

Technology and Telematics

  • Without the need for a manufacturer specific app to be installed on the smart device, the vehicle infotainment system can access and control functions of a smart device physically plugged-into the vehicle.
  • Mobile devices can wirelessly connect to the internet through the vehicle's private mobile network.

This incredible 2015 Jeep Wrangler Unlimited Freedom Edition will take your off-road adventures to new heights. With only 34,365 miles on it, this well-maintained beauty offers the perfect combination of style and reliability. Its powerful V6 engine and four-wheel drive capability will conquer any terrain, while the sporty design and sleek Bright White Clearcoat exterior will turn heads wherever you go. Don't miss your chance to own this ultimate freedom machine! Tim Test Tim Test Tim Test The 2015 Jeep Wrangler Unlimited Freedom Edition boasts some impressive features that make it stand out from the crowd. Located in Contra Costa County, family owned and operated for over 15 years. El Cerrito Honda is the East Bay’s one-stop Honda shop. We offer a range of automotive services, from new and used models, to top-notch service and expert customization options. Whether you’re in the market for a new or used vehicle, looking for exceptional service, or ready to customize, at El Cerrito Honda you’re guaranteed the selection, service, and support you need. Conveniently located at 11755 San Pablo Ave. El Cerrito, CA and a short drive from Concord, Oakland, and Walnut Creek we’re here to help you drive away in the Honda of your dreams.

Convenience

  • This intelligent cruise control system uses laser or radar to maintain a preset following distance behind another vehicle, automatically braking or accelerating as required.

Safety and Security

  • The vehicle is equipped with a system that senses, and then prepares, the vehicle and/or occupants, for an impending forward collision.
  • The vehicle constantly monitors the roadway in front of the vehicle and identifies and tracks pedestrians on an interior display. If the system determines a likely impact, it will automatically take preventative steps to avoid hitting the pedestrian.
  • The vehicle is equipped with a camera that displays an image of the area behind the vehicle on an interior display.
  • An active lane departure system alerts the driver of unintended movement of the vehicle out of a designated traffic lane and automatically maintains the vehicle's position within that lane.
  • Brake assist senses panic braking from the speed of the brake pedal's travel and applies all available power brake boost.

Technology and Telematics

  • Without the need for a manufacturer specific app to be installed on the smart device, the vehicle infotainment system can access and control functions of a smart device physically plugged-into the vehicle.

That’s because when you buy a qualifying new Chevy, you’ll receive Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick’s Chevrolet Lifetime Powertrain Warranty! This exclusive warranty covers your new Chevy’s powertrain for as long as you own the vehicle, ensuring you receive a reliable model and certified service on the Petal roads. Learn more about our Chevrolet Lifetime Powertrain Warranty and what’s covered on your vehicle with the team at Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick below. How the Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick Chevrolet Lifetime Powertrain Warranty Works Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick’s Chevrolet Lifetime Powertrain Warranty is simple. When you purchase a qualifying new Chevy model at our Hattiesburg dealership, your vehicle’s powertrain components are covered for the entire duration of your ownership with a flat repair cost of $100. To keep an eye on your vehicle’s health and functionality, we require that all recommended Chevy service intervals are followed and that your car is exclusively serviced at Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick’s certified service department. This allows our technicians to monitor all your covered components, watching for wear, tear, and breakage before it becomes an issue on the Laurel roads. What’s Covered in the Lifetime Powertrain Warranty? The Lifetime Powertrain Warranty at Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick covers a wide range of components, from the inner workings of your engine to vital parts of your drivetrain assembly. Explore all the covered components of the Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick Chevrolet Lifetime Powertrain Warranty below: Engine:* Pistons & Piston Rings Crankshaft & Main Bearings Connecting Rods & Rod Bearings Camshaft & Camshaft Bearings Timing Gears & Timing Chain Valves Valve Springs Guides Oil Pump Rocker Arms Push Rods Hydraulic Lifters Rocker Arm Shaft Cylinder Heads Transmission:** Bearings Bushings Gear Shafts Clutch Plates & Drums Oil Pumps Servo Units Rings Governor Torus Unit Torque Converter & Valves All Internal Gears Drive Axle Assembly & Drive Shaft:*** Rear Gear & Pinion Gear Bushings Bearings Spacers Spider Gears Axle Gears & Shafts Drive Shaft Universal & Constant Velocity Joints Transfer Case (4×4 Vehicles):**** All Internal Components Get Started With Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick Today! Whether you’re interested in a new powerful Chevy Silverado 1500 pickup or the fuel-efficient Chevy Trax, Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick has you covered for life! For more details about our Lifetime Powertrain Warranty, contact us online or at (800) 578-7871. No matter what new Chevy has sparked your interest, Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick is here to put you behind the wheel with comprehensive coverage and confidence! Disclaimers: * The engine block and cylinder walls and sleeves are also covered if the mechanical failure is the direct result of the failure of a part covered by this policy. **No coverage is provided for any electrical component pertaining to the operation of any transmission. *The transmission case on both standard and automatic transmissions are also covered if mechanical failure was the direct result of the failure of a part covered by this policy. The odometer driven gear, manual transmission clutch disc, pressure plate, clutch release bearing and pilot bearing are not covered at any time or for any reason. ***The drive axle assembly housing and drive shaft housing are covered if their mechanical failure was the direct result of the failure of a part covered by this policy. ****The transfer case housing is also covered if mechanical failure was the direct result of the failure of a part covered by this policy.

When shopping for your next Chevy car, truck, or SUV, no other dealership in the Columbia area gives you peace of mind like Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick. That’s because when you buy a qualifying new Chevy, you’ll receive Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick’s Chevrolet Lifetime Powertrain Warranty! This exclusive warranty covers your new Chevy’s powertrain for as long as you own the vehicle, ensuring you receive a reliable model and certified service on the Petal roads. Learn more about our Chevrolet Lifetime Powertrain Warranty and what’s covered on your vehicle with the team at Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick below. How the Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick Chevrolet Lifetime Powertrain Warranty Works Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick’s Chevrolet Lifetime Powertrain Warranty is simple. When you purchase a qualifying new Chevy model at our Hattiesburg dealership, your vehicle’s powertrain components are covered for the entire duration of your ownership with a flat repair cost of $100. To keep an eye on your vehicle’s health and functionality, we require that all recommended Chevy service intervals are followed and that your car is exclusively serviced at Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick’s certified service department. This allows our technicians to monitor all your covered components, watching for wear, tear, and breakage before it becomes an issue on the Laurel roads. What’s Covered in the Lifetime Powertrain Warranty? The Lifetime Powertrain Warranty at Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick covers a wide range of components, from the inner workings of your engine to vital parts of your drivetrain assembly. Explore all the covered components of the Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick Chevrolet Lifetime Powertrain Warranty below: Engine:* Pistons & Piston Rings Crankshaft & Main Bearings Connecting Rods & Rod Bearings Camshaft & Camshaft Bearings Timing Gears & Timing Chain Valves Valve Springs Guides Oil Pump Rocker Arms Push Rods Hydraulic Lifters Rocker Arm Shaft Cylinder Heads Transmission:** Bearings Bushings Gear Shafts Clutch Plates & Drums Oil Pumps Servo Units Rings Governor Torus Unit Torque Converter & Valves All Internal Gears Drive Axle Assembly & Drive Shaft:*** Rear Gear & Pinion Gear Bushings Bearings Spacers Spider Gears Axle Gears & Shafts Drive Shaft Universal & Constant Velocity Joints Transfer Case (4×4 Vehicles):**** All Internal Components Get Started With Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick Today! Whether you’re interested in a new powerful Chevy Silverado 1500 pickup or the fuel-efficient Chevy Trax, Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick has you covered for life! For more details about our Lifetime Powertrain Warranty, contact us online or at (800) 578-7871. No matter what new Chevy has sparked your interest, Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick is here to put you behind the wheel with comprehensive coverage and confidence! The odometer driven gear, manual transmission clutch disc, pressure plate, clutch release bearing and pilot bearing are not covered at any time or for any reason. ***The drive axle assembly housing and drive shaft housing are covered if their mechanical failure was the direct result of the failure of a part covered by this policy. ****The transfer case housing is also covered if mechanical failure was the direct result of the failure of a part covered by this policy.

result.description: The 2026 Mercedes-Benz GLE 350 is the epitome of luxury and performance, designed to cater to the discerning driver who values both style and substance. With a sleek and modern exterior, this SUV exudes sophistication and class, making a bold statement on the road. Under the hood, the GLE 350 boasts a powerful 2.0-liter turbocharged inline-4 engine that delivers an impressive 255 horsepower and 273 lb-ft of torque. Paired with a smooth 9-speed automatic transmission, this vehicle offers a dynamic driving experience with quick acceleration and precise handling, perfect for tackling both city streets and open highways with ease. The GLE 350 is equipped with Mercedes-Benz's renowned 4MATIC all-wheel drive system, providing enhanced traction and stability in various road conditions. Whether you're navigating through snowy mountain passes or cruising along rain-soaked highways, this SUV offers confidence-inspiring performance that you can rely on. Inside the cabin, the 2026 GLE 350 is a sanctuary of comfort and luxury, featuring premium materials and cutting-edge technology. From the leather-upholstered seats to the dual-zone automatic climate control system, every detail is meticulously crafted to enhance your driving experience. For tech-savvy drivers, the GLE 350 comes equipped with the latest Mercedes-Benz User Experience (MBUX) infotainment system, which includes a responsive touchscreen display, voice command functionality, and smartphone integration capabilities. Stay connected, entertained, and informed on the go, all within the confines of your luxurious SUV. Standard Model

    Safety and Security

    • The vehicle is equipped with a system that senses, and then prepares, the vehicle and/or occupants, for an impending forward collision.
    • The vehicle constantly monitors the roadway in front of the vehicle and identifies and tracks pedestrians on an interior display. If the system determines a likely impact, it will automatically take preventative steps to avoid hitting the pedestrian.
    • With this system the driver's hands must remain on the wheel at all times but can be removed briefly (for a few seconds), otherwise the vehicle will prompt the driver to put their hands back on the wheel.
    • The vehicle is equipped with a camera that displays an image of the area behind the vehicle on an interior display.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Without the need for a manufacturer specific app to be installed on the smart device, the vehicle infotainment system can access and control functions of a smart device physically plugged-into the vehicle.
    When shopping for your next Chevy car, truck, or SUV, no other dealership in the Columbia area gives you peace of mind like Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick. That’s because when you buy a qualifying new Chevy, you’ll receive Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick’s Chevrolet Lifetime Powertrain Warranty! This exclusive warranty covers your new Chevy’s powertrain for as long as you own the vehicle, ensuring you receive a reliable model and certified service on the Petal roads. Learn more about our Chevrolet Lifetime Powertrain Warranty and what’s covered on your vehicle with the team at Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick below. How the Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick Chevrolet Lifetime Powertrain Warranty Works Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick’s Chevrolet Lifetime Powertrain Warranty is simple. When you purchase a qualifying new Chevy model at our Hattiesburg dealership, your vehicle’s powertrain components are covered for the entire duration of your ownership with a flat repair cost of $100. To keep an eye on your vehicle’s health and functionality, we require that all recommended Chevy service intervals are followed and that your car is exclusively serviced at Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick’s certified service department. This allows our technicians to monitor all your covered components, watching for wear, tear, and breakage before it becomes an issue on the Laurel roads. What’s Covered in the Lifetime Powertrain Warranty? The Lifetime Powertrain Warranty at Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick covers a wide range of components, from the inner workings of your engine to vital parts of your drivetrain assembly. Whether you’re interested in a new powerful Chevy Silverado 1500 pickup or the fuel-efficient Chevy Trax, Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick has you covered for life! No matter what new Chevy has sparked your interest, Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick is here to put you behind the wheel with comprehensive coverage and confidence! Standard Model

    Safety and Security

    • The vehicle is equipped with a system that senses, and then prepares, the vehicle and/or occupants, for an impending forward collision.
    • The vehicle constantly monitors the roadway in front of the vehicle and identifies and tracks pedestrians on an interior display. If the system determines a likely impact, it will automatically take preventative steps to avoid hitting the pedestrian.
    • With this system the driver's hands must remain on the wheel at all times but can be removed briefly (for a few seconds), otherwise the vehicle will prompt the driver to put their hands back on the wheel.

    When shopping for your next Chevy car, truck, or SUV, no other dealership in the Columbia area gives you peace of mind like Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick. That’s because when you buy a qualifying new Chevy, you’ll receive Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick’s Chevrolet Lifetime Powertrain Warranty! This exclusive warranty covers your new Chevy’s powertrain for as long as you own the vehicle, ensuring you receive a reliable model and certified service on the Petal roads. Learn more about our Chevrolet Lifetime Powertrain Warranty and what’s covered on your vehicle with the team at Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick below. How the Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick Chevrolet Lifetime Powertrain Warranty Works Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick’s Chevrolet Lifetime Powertrain Warranty is simple. When you purchase a qualifying new Chevy model at our Hattiesburg dealership, your vehicle’s powertrain components are covered for the entire duration of your ownership with a flat repair cost of $100. To keep an eye on your vehicle’s health and functionality, we require that all recommended Chevy service intervals are followed and that your car is exclusively serviced at Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick’s certified service department. This allows our technicians to monitor all your covered components, watching for wear, tear, and breakage before it becomes an issue on the Laurel roads. What’s Covered in the Lifetime Powertrain Warranty? The Lifetime Powertrain Warranty at Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick covers a wide range of components, from the inner workings of your engine to vital parts of your drivetrain assembly. Explore all the covered components of the Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick Chevrolet Lifetime Powertrain Warranty below: Engine:* Pistons & Piston Rings Crankshaft & Main Bearings Connecting Rods & Rod Bearings Camshaft & Camshaft Bearings Timing Gears & Timing Chain Valves Valve Springs Guides Oil Pump Rocker Arms Push Rods Hydraulic Lifters Rocker Arm Shaft Cylinder Heads Transmission:** Bearings Bushings Gear Shafts Clutch Plates & Drums Oil Pumps Servo Units Rings Governor Torus Unit Torque Converter & Valves All Internal Gears Drive Axle Assembly & Drive Shaft:*** Rear Gear & Pinion Gear Bushings Bearings Spacers Spider Gears Axle Gears & Shafts Drive Shaft Universal & Constant Velocity Joints Transfer Case (4×4 Vehicles):**** All Internal Components Get Started With Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick Today! Whether you’re interested in a new powerful Chevy Silverado 1500 pickup or the fuel-efficient Chevy Trax, Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick has you covered for life! For more details about our Lifetime Powertrain Warranty, contact us online or at (800) 578-7871. No matter what new Chevy has sparked your interest, Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick is here to put you behind the wheel with comprehensive coverage and confidence! Disclaimers: * The engine block and cylinder walls and sleeves are also covered if the mechanical failure is the direct result of the failure of a part covered by this policy. **No coverage is provided for any electrical component pertaining to the operation of any transmission. *The transmission case on both standard and automatic transmissions are also covered if mechanical failure was the direct result of the failure of a part covered by this policy. The odometer driven gear, manual transmission clutch disc, pressure plate, clutch release bearing and pilot bearing are not covered at any time or for any reason. ***The drive axle assembly housing and drive shaft housing are covered if their mechanical failure was the direct result of the failure of a part covered by this policy. ****The transfer case housing is also covered if mechanical failure was the direct result of the failure of a part covered by this policy.

When you purchase a qualifying new Chevy model at our Hattiesburg dealership, your vehicle’s powertrain components are covered for the entire duration of your ownership with a flat repair cost of $100.
